title: Clean stale dirty EBS Zephyr primary worktree
description: Why this exists: while validating project-LICHEN-t2hn.5.2.1, /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN on the persistent EBS cache was behind origin/main and had many stale modified/untracked files from earlier sessions, so a direct git pull was refused. What needs to be done: audit whether any EBS-only changes are valuable, preserve them if needed, then reset or replace the primary cached worktree with a clean origin/main workspace and document the preferred clean-worktree validation path. Acceptance criteria: future EC2 builders can update /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN without merge refusals, or the README explicitly marks it as dirty/preserved and points builds to a clean worktree.
notes: Completed EBS primary worktree cleanup on EC2 i-05e27e074db786e22. Preserved the previous dirty state at /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/preserved-primary-worktree-20260702T0225Z (1.6M): head-before.txt, origin-main-before.txt, status-before.txt, tracked-diff-before.patch, git-clean-dry-run-before.txt, untracked-before.txt, untracked-source-before.txt, and untracked-source-before.tar.gz. Reset /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN to origin/main and ran git clean -fd; one root-owned stale build-review-ping-l2 directory required sudo rm -rf before clean could complete. Fetched origin/main again, reset to latest, and verified git pull --ff-only returns Already up to date with git status --short --branch showing ## main...origin/main. Ignored Zephyr cache directories .west, zephyr, modules, and build remain present. No repository code/script/doc edits were made; codereview requirement did not apply. Future EC2 validation should continue to prefer dedicated clean worktrees under /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/ for task builds, while the primary path is now updateable.
close_reason: Completed EBS primary worktree cleanup. Dirty state preserved under /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/preserved-primary-worktree-20260702T0225Z, primary reset to origin/main, git clean completed, git pull --ff-only now succeeds, and Zephyr cache dirs remain present.
